brief: In brix.rel, add total pure Int helpers that packages can use when talking about relation sizes (no real Rel values yet — keep it Int-level). Exact `fn`/`=` syntax. Add: `fn isEmpty(n: Int) -> Bool = n == 0`, `fn nonempty(n: Int) -> Bool = n > 0`, `fn atLeast(n: Int, k: Int) -> Bool = n >= k`, `fn atMost(n: Int, k: Int) -> Bool = n <= k`, `fn exactly(n: Int, k: Int) -> Bool = n == k`. Do not add entities, capabilities, state, or fake Rel types. Host formats after check.
